keyPointsSummary: 'Used to' describes past habits or states that are no longer true
Negative: did not use to / didn't use to

quickQuiz.answer: I used to go to school daily.
We used to live in a village.

quickQuiz.hindi: क्या तुम पहले यहाँ रहते थे?
quickQuiz.answer: Did you use to live here?
He used to be very shy.

quickQuiz.hindi: मैं यह गाना बहुत सुनता था।
quickQuiz.answer: I used to listen to this song a lot.
They used to meet every week.

mustRememberRules: 'Used to' describes past habits or states that are no longer true
Negative: did not use to / didn't use to
